{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|The Boot|2}}{{R|The Boot||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Trash Heap|2}}. It raises unblocked attacks that deal less than 5 damage to 5.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained randomly from {{E|Trash Heap|2}} by selecting the {{Frame|Dive In}} option. 

== Interactions ==
* The Boot can allow for damaging {{M|Skulking Colony||2}} past the limits of it's Hardened Shell.

== Trivia ==

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added The Boot to the game.
